channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Revelations in the Ruins
item.description:
Deep in the wastelands of Zern, the crew searches for answers about the nature of its past.

Duration: 2:13:00

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: A Fraught Forge in Zern
item.description:
The crew battles dangerous conditions to build a mech while under siege from the Naughtomata.

Duration: 2:34:59

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Run-in with the Ruinous Queen
item.description:
New perils emerge as the crew contends with forces under the influence of the Queen of Zern.

Duration: 1:39:19

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Mounting Mysteries at Mount Charuk
item.description:
In the aftermath of the battle, the crew finds their way to old friends—and discover new foes.

Duration: 2:28:52

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
